rules.inactive_rule: Local character images that are not on the live website roster are inactive and must not be generated.
rules.placeholder_rule: Active members using img/600.png are active placeholders. Do not generate unique avatars until identity details exist.
rules.team_image_rule: Do not write names, handles, roles, or labels onto people.
rules.number_rule: If visible, the sacred number must be stacked as 600/000/000/000.
rules.full_body_rule: Generate adult full-body, head-to-toe, riggable humanoid characters unless explicitly making 2D mascot art.

active_members.name: dni
active_members.image_details: Dark hooded mystic/operator, glowing orange stacked 600 disk behind head, raised hands, palm lights, chest light, warm ritual-tech atmosphere.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult humanoid signal bearer in dark robe or long coat, centered and calm, hands open, small round stone or orb near chest or feet, orange halo behind head.

active_members.name: nind
active_members.image_details: Abstract cyan/black architectural dome or grid viewed from below, tunnel depth, human presence implied.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult humanoid architect/operator in clean dark utility clothing, framed by cyan dome geometry, bridge grid, or blueprint-light structure.

active_members.name: michael1011
active_members.image_details: Hooded seated engineer monk in warm circular chamber, glowing orange floor node, triangle/sigil cue, technical halo.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult hooded engineer monk, seated or standing in workshop stance, hands near glowing node, subtle cables and machine geometry.

active_members.name: sat
active_members.image_details: Astronaut/explorer in old city or plaza, bulky suit, glowing Bitcoin emblem as helmet face/visor, warm orange-gold light.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult astronaut/explorer in clean bulky suit, helmet or chest emblem as main icon, standing in public square, conference plaza, or mission gate.

active_members.name: flx
active_members.image_details: Dense Bullbear chaos collage: armored bear/bull guardian, horns, glowing eyes, black armor, coffee mug, orange lightning, volcanic chaos, market debris, racooDNI side gag.
active_members.full_body_standard: Simplified adult humanoid Bullbear chaos-engineer guardian with black armor, horned/bear-mask helmet or crest, heavy boots, coffee/tool cue, orange lightning cracks.

active_members.name: shillie
active_members.image_details: Public-facing operator with sunglasses, raised hands, orange stacked 600 disk as face/halo, warm urban/event backdrop.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult amplifier/operator with sunglasses, open-hand pose, streetwear or stage jacket, orange disk/halo behind head or chest emblem, party-stage or city venue light.

active_members.name: arbadacarba
active_members.image_details: Elegant robed strategist in grand ritual library or hall, full-body stance, arms open, glowing stacked 600 orb, gold/brown atmosphere.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult strategist in dark robe or tailored ritual coat, centered in library or council archive, one glowing orb or book-light behind, composed posture.

active_members.name: benarc
active_members.image_details: Dynamic vision crafter/forge figure, raised tool or blade-like object, dramatic orange light, glowing 600 shield/orb, workshop action.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult creator in forge-workshop clothing, one hand lifting tool, brush, or hammer, other hand shaping glowing emblem or artifact.

active_members.name: tobo
active_members.image_details: Frontier diplomat/statesman with tricorn hat, sunglasses or laser-eye glow, old-world coat, pointing hand, warm gold background.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult envoy in old-world coat and tricorn silhouette, confident pointing or welcoming gesture, warm civic backdrop, subtle Bitcoin/600B signal object.

active_members.name: BlackCoffee
active_members.image_details: Dark armored shadow operator/knight under storm sky, coffee mug, lightning, glowing stacked 600 disk behind, quiet intense pose.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult armored operator in black or charcoal armor/heavy coat, coffee mug as signature object, storm light behind, disciplined low-motion posture.
avoid: blue noir palette overpowering orange signal

active_members.name: darren
active_members.image_details: Cartoon donkey on mountain peak, orange Bitcoin flag, snowy peaks, blue binary sky, clear meme simplicity.
active_members.full_body_standard: 2D mascot can remain donkey. For game/VRM, use adult humanoid pathfinder with explorer clothes, donkey companion, and orange flag.
